preamble: Epenthesis of [ε] (epsilon) occurs as anaptyxis to break up consonant clusters, common in Hebrew and various Arabic dialects.

examples.note: Segolate noun: epenthetic [ε] inserted in final CVC cluster; the pattern generalizes across the segolate class (*/dabb/ → deḇer, */sippr/ → sēper).
Epenthetic [ε] used to break tri-consonantal clusters in Maghrebi Arabic; specific lexical examples not given in source — flagged.
